name: Pyramid — Research Funding Tiers with Dollar Amounts
input: Show the research funding pyramid. Bottom (most common): Seed Grants ($5K-$50K), next: R21/Pilot Awards ($100K-$300K), then: R01/R15 Grants ($250K-$500K/year), then: Program Project Grants ($1M-$5M), top (rarest): Center Grants ($5M-$25M/year).
qualityCriteria: Items present (Seed Grants, Pilot Awards, R01, Program Project, Center Grants)
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Pyramid with 5 layers, widest at bottom (Seed Grants) to narrowest at top (Center Grants). Each layer shows dollar range.

data.title: Research Funding Tiers

items.label: Center Grants
items.description: Multi-PI institutional center awards for large research programs

items.label: Program Project Grants
items.description: Multi-project collaborative grants with shared resources

items.label: Seed Grants
items.description: Small institutional or foundation grants for feasibility studies

data.caption: NIH and institutional funding tiers from most common (base) to rarest (apex)
